message:
fix(db): include trigger cleanup in base migrations and make LIKE fallback permissive

Two database layer fixes:

1. Schema migrations (schema.rs): Include base_trigger_cleanup_migrations
   in schema_migrations_base() so trigger drops are recorded in the
   migrations table rather than applied idempotently at runtime. Update
   4 tests to use migrate_to_latest_base instead of migrate_to_latest
   to align with the base migration path (excludes FTS5 virtual tables,
   safe for FrankenConnection).

2. LIKE fallback search (queries.rs): Change multi-term LIKE queries
   from AND-joined to OR-joined conditions in run_like_fallback,
   run_like_fallback_product, and run_like_fallback_global. When FTS5
   is unavailable, requiring all terms to match (AND) was too
   restrictive and returned empty results for partial matches. OR
   semantics keep the fallback permissive — better to return extra
   results than miss relevant ones.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
